## LibraryRuntime.IIngredientResolutionResult interface

Result of attempting to resolve an ingredient reference. Used when partial resolution is acceptable (e.g., for alternates).

**Signature:**

```typescript
export interface IIngredientResolutionResult<TIngredient extends IIngredient = IIngredient> 
```
